scenarios.name: scenario2_workload999
scenarios.description: QaaS Slot Management - Workload 999: 8 Policy Configurations

runs.name: strict_priority_enabled
runs.description: Policy A: Strict Priority - Preemptive scheduling enabled (short jobs preempt long jobs)

runs.name: strict_priority_disabled
runs.description: Policy A: Strict Priority - Disabled (no preemption)

runs.name: fixed_ratio_70
runs.description: Policy B: Fixed Ratio - Reserve 70% of baseline slots (280/400) for short jobs

runs.name: fixed_ratio_90
runs.description: Policy B: Fixed Ratio - Reserve 90% of baseline slots (360/400) for short jobs

runs.name: slot_scaling_interrupt_2pct
runs.description: Policy C: Slot Scaling - 2% spot interruption frequency

runs.name: slot_scaling_interrupt_5pct
runs.description: Policy C: Slot Scaling - 5% spot interruption frequency

runs.name: slot_scaling_interrupt_10pct
runs.description: Policy C: Slot Scaling - 10% spot interruption frequency

runs.name: ondemand_default
runs.description: Baseline: Default QaaS on-demand (no spot, no special policies)
